content.divergence_summary: The same chorus, two opposite responses: main left the sound to recover working surface, alt2-migration stayed inside the sound to keep a single bearing. Main bought silence to escape it; alt2 bought stillness to listen through it. Main's day produced thin forage and cold; alt2's produced no forage at all and a confirmed bearing.
content.branch_a_path: Climbed the upper canopy above the root cross to find altitude where sound thinned; held the position through the day at the cost of meager forage and cold wind; came down late and thinner.
content.branch_b_path: Held the recovery position from yesterday's bank collapse through the chorus to preserve the colony bearing; refused to move or eat; brief late window confirmed colony at the same direction and distance, unmoved; cold reached the spine.
key_differences: strategy: main retreated from the sound (vertical escape); alt2-migration stayed inside it (immobile listening)
purpose of the silence: main wanted quiet ground to function in; alt2-migration wanted a window to hear through
movement: main was mobile (climbed, gripped high branches); alt2 did not move at all
food cost: main got meager altitude forage; alt2 ate nothing all day
health cost direction: main paid in wind-cold from height; alt2 paid in deep stillness-cold from a held crouch
outcome of the day: main returned with body and attention; alt2 returned with body, attention, and a confirmed bearing past the rise
shared_elements: same saturating chorus drove the day's strategy in both branches
both paid health and food cost for what they sought
both ended the day with attention sharpened by the filtering work
both used a single fixed location to absorb the day
